variants.name: 班德斯尼奇
variants.ability: 在你的首个夜晚，你会得知一名在场角色。每局游戏限一次，你可以在白天公开猜测谁是那名角色：如果猜测正确，那么他和他邻近的一名存活玩家会一同死亡。
variants.firstNightReminder: Learns the roll where their *KNOWN* token is. :reminder:
variants.flavor: Part of the Queen of Hearts hunting party and will kill others who stand between them and their prey.
